bastion-shield.name: Bastion Shield
bastion-shield.description: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking model is within 12", worsen the AP of that attack by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, if the attacking model is within 18", worsen the AP by 1 instead.

quake-multigenerator.name: Quake Multigenerator
quake-multigenerator.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

ironskein.name: Ironskein
ironskein.description: Add +2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

high-kahl.name: High Kâhl
high-kahl.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

oathbound-speculator.name: Oathbound Speculator
oathbound-speculator.description:
Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

dead-reckoning.name: Dead Reckoning
dead-reckoning.description: At the end of the turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you spent no YP in that turn, you can gain 1YP.

iron-ambassador.name: Iron Ambassador
iron-ambassador.restriction: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model with Autoch-pattern combi-bolter only
iron-ambassador.description: Once per battle, when the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 3YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's ranged weapons.

ancestral-crest.name: Ancestral Crest
ancestral-crest.description: Once per turn, when you target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend 1YP and reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

delvwerke-navigator.name: Dêlvwerke Navigator
delvwerke-navigator.description: In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly CTHONIAN BESERKS unit visible to the bearer and then spend any number of YP. Return one destroyed model to that unit and then, for every 2YP you just spent, return up to one additional destroyed model to that unit.

multiwave-system-jammer.name: Multiwave System Jammer
multiwave-system-jammer.description: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly CTHONIAN unit that is in Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

quake-supervisor.name: Quake Supervisor
quake-supervisor.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN ARTILLERY units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ARTILLERY units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, add 1 to the Hit roll.

piledriver.name: Piledriver
piledriver.description: Each time the bearer's unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 2YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

tactical-alchemy.name: Tactical Alchemy
tactical-alchemy.description: In your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control that are not within your deployment zone, you can spend 1YP. If you do, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

trivarg-cyber-implant.name: Trivärg Cyber Implant
trivarg-cyber-implant.description: In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, or if you spend 2YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

precursive-judgement.name: Precursive Judgement
precursive-judgement.description: While the bearer's unit is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT units, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP and hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

signature-restoration.name: Signature Restoration
signature-restoration.description: Each time a friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN model is repaired using the bearer's Forgewrought Expertise ability, that model regains 1 additional lost wound.
